The '''Grey golem''' is encountered during the [[Spirits of the Elid]] [[quest]]. He guards the southernmost door in the [[River Elid]] cave and appears in front of the player, exclaiming {{overhead|You may not pass!}} and must be defeated using the [[Slash]] attack style. Other styles work, but deal significantly lower damage.
